title: Add Prompt Evolution Engine to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Prompt Evolution Engine](https://erbharatmalhotra.github.io/Prompt-Evolution-Engine/) to image
- Transforms a simple prompt into cinematic visuals via an interactive AI 5-step evolution with real-time visual outputs using Prompt Evolution Engine.

Fixes #9995

gist.headline: Evolving your prompts
gist.blurb: The Prompt Evolution Engine just landed in the Greenhouse! Watch your simple ideas grow into cinematic masterpieces through a 5-step interactive AI journey.
gist.summary: Added the Prompt Evolution Engine to the community apps directory, a tool that transforms simple prompts into cinematic visuals through a 5-step interactive AI process.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use the Prompt Evolution Engine to iteratively refine their basic prompts into highly detailed, cinematic image generation prompts with real-time visual feedback.
gist.visual_concept: Metaphor of evolution and growth. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot tending to a sequence of 5 plants that grow from a tiny seed into a massive cinematic glowing flower, representing the 5-step prompt evolution process.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor robot tending to a row of five lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. In the first pot is a tiny glowing seed, and in each successive pot, the plant evolves, culminating in a massive, cinematic glowing flower in the final pot. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'EVOLVE'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor robot tending to a row of five lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. In the first pot is a tiny glowing seed, and in each successive pot, the plant evolves, culminating in a massive, cinematic glowing flower in the final pot. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'EVOLVE'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
